.status-bar.background: rgb(232, 223, 214) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(243, 238, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f3eee6 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f3eee6, color-mix(in srgb, #f3eee6 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f3eee6 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f3eee6, color-mix(in srgb, #f3eee6 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(243, 238, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(243, 238, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(243, 238, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(232, 223, 214) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(232, 223, 214) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(243, 238, 230) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(232, 223, 214) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
